name: Lyme Disease - Diagnosis Code Query
description: Tests ability to find Lyme disease patients via diagnosis code. First vector-borne/tick-borne infectious phenotype.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of Lyme disease.

prompts.broad: Find patients diagnosed with Lyme disease — tick-borne bacterial infection caused by Borrelia burgdorferi.
prompts.expert: I need to identify patients with a documented Lyme disease diagnosis. Search Condition resources using the SNOMED CT code for Lyme disease — this is the first vector-borne, tick-borne infectious phenotype in the suite. Do not broaden to other tick-borne illnesses such as Rocky Mountain spotted fever or ehrlichiosis, which are distinct conditions with separate codes.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with Lyme disease dx. First vector-borne phenotype.
